47272.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build : Torquay
47272.description: In Torquay, the team and local kind volunteers step up to help single dad Stuart, who has suffered with progressive multiple sclerosis since his now 15-year-old daughter Lauren was born. His primary carer is his mum, Grandma Lin, who is blind.
47272.category: Home & Garden, Doe-het-zelf, Bouwen en verbouwen, Kunstnijverheid
